creator: henning.matyschok@outlook.com
text:
Created attachment 231742
Patch against distinfo and Makefile, g20220211, head

New patch:
diff --git a/net/vether-kmod/Makefile b/net/vether-kmod/Makefile
index 3990046e1bdf..ee5ff6810df4 100644
--- a/net/vether-kmod/Makefile
+++ b/net/vether-kmod/Makefile
@@ -1,8 +1,8 @@
 PORTNAME=	vether-kmod
-DISTVERSION=	g20211214
+DISTVERSION=	g20220211
 CATEGORIES=	net
 
-MAINTAINER=	henning.matyschok@outlook.com
+MAINTAINER=	Henning.matyschok@outlook.com
 COMMENT=	Virtual Ethernet Interface
 
 LICENSE=	BSD2CLAUSE ISCL
@@ -11,9 +11,9 @@ LICENSE_COMB=	multi
 USES=		kmod uidfix
 
 USE_GITHUB=	yes
-GH_ACCOUNT=	hmatyschok
+GH_ACCOUNT=	marforeur
 GH_PROJECT=	if_vether
-GH_TAGNAME=	511ee3b393029cfff0c5b1873fe0a16f077a7459
+GH_TAGNAME=	3a4426134448f0216fc92cd6eeaa2804ae8b118a
 
 WRKSRC_SUBDIR=	src
 
diff --git a/net/vether-kmod/distinfo b/net/vether-kmod/distinfo
index 9b59f036d5d4..0bb953c33b6d 100644
--- a/net/vether-kmod/distinfo
+++ b/net/vether-kmod/distinfo
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-TIMESTAMP = 1639499475
-SHA256 (hmatyschok-if_vether-g20211214-511ee3b393029cfff0c5b1873fe0a16f077a7459_GH0.tar.gz) = a97a5fd68d6f13f6114fcadd0d5ef59766b8e088466b8c33e5fd035bc08edaf8
-SIZE (hmatyschok-if_vether-g20211214-511ee3b393029cfff0c5b1873fe0a16f077a7459_GH0.tar.gz) = 7936
+TIMESTAMP = 1644559063
+SHA256 (marforeur-if_vether-g20220211-3a4426134448f0216fc92cd6eeaa2804ae8b118a_GH0.tar.gz) = 83de2a7be38529679fcddc8f1f394c30fa4776f76b43fdbbdc3b40949367ac30
+SIZE (marforeur-if_vether-g20220211-3a4426134448f0216fc92cd6eeaa2804ae8b118a_GH0.tar.gz) = 8653

Would you please commit recent changes, upstream, to head.

 Henning Andersen Matyschok, 120179M11214, United States Marine Corps, United States Air Force Facility
 Wasserlooser Weg 5
 Flensburg
 24944 Germany
